overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a character walking through a mountainous rural village at sunset. The camera moves along a dirt path past wooden watchtowers and fences, encountering an NPC with a lantern, then continues along a cliffside trail toward a distant village with a prominent spire visible in the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain village path with wooden watchtowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between wooden fences and watchtowers

entered.detail: tall wooden watchtower with figure standing on top platform
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
low stone wall with grass growing on top
second wooden tower visible in the distance down the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dirt path winding through a mountain village at golden hour. Wooden watchtowers and fences line the route, with warm sunset light creating long shadows across the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with round huts and cliffside

events.description: camera briefly pans left revealing round village huts before continuing along the cliffside path

agents.ego_description: passing an NPC villager holding a lantern and glancing toward the village huts

notable_agents.action: standing still holding a glowing lantern as the camera passes by

entered.detail: traditional round hut with conical roof visible to the left of the path
massive boulder and rock outcropping along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a villager holding a lantern on the path, then briefly reveals round huts of a small settlement to the left. The trail continues alongside a large rock formation as the wooden watchtower recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail with steep rock face

events.description: purple wildflowers become visible along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow path beside the steep rock cliff

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the path toward the valley

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the right boundary of the narrow trail
clusters of purple flowers growing along the base of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between a steep cliff face on the right and open drop-off on the left. Purple wildflowers line the trail base while a distant figure walks ahead. The wooden fence continues intermittently along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with distant village

events.description: path opens from narrow cliffside to wide valley vista revealing distant village spire

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant village visible in the misty valley ahead

entered.detail: distinctive church-like spire of a distant village nestled in the valley
layered mountain ridges visible in the hazy distance
wide misty valley opening up ahead with the village at its center

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a breathtaking wide valley vista. A distant village with a prominent spire sits in the misty basin below, surrounded by layered mountain ranges. The path continues forward through grass meadows with wildflowers as the camera approaches the valley edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic mountain village that gradually opens into a vast, sweeping valley vista at sunset. It begins on a winding dirt path lined with wooden watchtowers and fences, where warm golden light casts long shadows across the trail. As the camera passes a lantern-bearing villager and the round huts of a small settlement, the route shifts alongside a massive rock formation. The scene then narrows into a cliffside trail bordered by purple wildflowers and a steep drop-off before turning toward a distant figure walking ahead. Finally, the path expands into a wide meadow, revealing a breathtaking view of a misty basin below where a distant village with a prominent spire sits nestled among layered mountain ranges.
